nation: Lac des Mille Lacs First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation holds interests in multiple business partnerships including Dallan Holdings, Firesteel Construction, Giiwedin Environmental Services, Glow Transformers, Bolt Utilities, Stoneman Contracting, Kakina Economic Development Group, Wataynikaneyap, Sovereign Wealth, Lot 251-3 Development LP, Bold Ventures Inc., and Treaty 3 Investment Group. Operates Savanne River Resort. Receives Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership gaming revenue distributions (1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues). Investment in Lot 251-3 Development LP of $1,835,000.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 1913563 Ontario Inc., Nezaadiikaang General Contracting GP Inc., Nezaadiikaang Economic Development LP, and Lac des Mille Lacs Realty Inc. as fully consolidated subsidiaries. Multiple GBE-type partnerships held at cost under portfolio investments (not equity method). Jordan's Principle invoicing is a significant component of both ISC and Health Canada funding totalling over $2.4M. Transmission Line Phase II ($2,326,155) is under construction with no amortization. OSR calculation includes OFNLP gaming distributions, tuition revenue, LP income, resort revenue, interest, and other non-government sources. No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text. Prior year included $770,000 membership distribution as other income and $105,000 Canadian Heritage and $23,000 Natural Resources Canada transfers not present in 2024.
